example: The company may incur significant losses if the merger fails.

meaning: To point out or show something.
example: The survey results indicate a shift in consumer preferences.

meaning: Absolutely necessary; essential.
example: Technology has become indispensable in modern business.

meaning: Certain to happen; unavoidable.
example: Change is inevitable in any growing organization.

meaning: To deduce or conclude from evidence and reasoning.
example: We can infer from the data that sales are declining.

meaning: The ability to assess and initiate things independently.
meaningNP: स्वतन्त्र रूपमा मूल्यांकन र पहल गर्ने क्षमता।
example: She took the initiative to organize the charity event.

meaning: An act of asking for information or an official investigation.
meaningNP: जानकारी माग्ने कार्य वा औपचारिक जाँच।
example: The company launched an internal inquiry into the incident.

meaning: To combine one thing with another so they become a whole.
meaningNP: एक कुरालाई अर्कोसँग मिलाएर सम्पूर्ण बनाउने。
example: The company plans to integrate AI into its operations.

meaning: The quality of being honest and having strong moral principles.
meaningNP: इमानदार र बलियो नैतिक सिद्धान्त भएको गुण।
example: The company is known for its integrity and transparency.

meaning: In or for the intervening period; provisional.
example: An interim solution was put in place while a permanent one was developed.

meaning: Very complicated or detailed.
example: The intricate details of the contract required careful review.

meaning: Belonging naturally; essential.
example: Curiosity is an intrinsic part of human nature.

meaning: To cite or appeal to someone or something as an authority.
meaningNP: प्राधिकारको रूपमा कसै वा केहीलाई उद्धृत गर्ने।
example: The lawyer invoked the First Amendment in her argument.

meaning: Unbreakable; having no loopholes.
example: The company signed an ironclad agreement with its supplier.

meaning: To cause a person or place to be or remain alone or apart from others.
meaningNP: व्यक्ति वा स्थानलाई एक्लो वा अलग बनाउने。
example: The company was isolated from the market due to poor communication.

meaning: To lose or lack vitality; grow weak.
example: The project languished without proper leadership.

meaning: To use something to maximum advantage.
example: The firm leveraged its network to secure new contracts.

meaning: The process of taking legal action.
example: The company settled the dispute to avoid lengthy litigation.

meaning: Producing a great deal of profit.
example: The merger proved to be highly lucrative for both companies.

meaning: An official order or commission to do something.
example: The government issued a mandate for stricter safety standards.

meaning: To display or show a quality or feeling by actions.
meaningNP: कार्यबाट गुण वा भावना प्रदर्शन गर्ने。
example: The team's dedication manifested in the project's success.

meaning: Relating to or at the edge; minor and not important.
meaningNP: किनारासँग सम्बन्धित; साना र महत्वपूर्ण नभएको。
example: The marginal improvement was not worth the additional cost.

meaning: Goods available for sale.
example: The store displays a wide variety of merchandise.

meaning: To make less severe, serious, or painful.
meaningNP: कम गम्भीर, गम्भीर, वा दुखद बनाउने。
example: Steps were taken to mitigate the impact of the disaster.

meaning: To observe and check the progress of something over a period.
meaningNP: समयसँगै कुनै कुराको प्रगति अवलोकन र जाँच गर्ने。
example: We need to monitor the situation closely.

meaning: A temporary prohibition of an activity.
example: The government declared a moratorium on new construction.

meaning: Having many different aspects or features.
meaningNP: धेरै फरक पक्ष वा विशेषता भएको。
example: The problem requires a multifaceted approach.

meaning: Just beginning to develop.
meaningNP: अभी सुरु भएको वा विकास हुन लागेको。
example: The nascent industry shows great promise for the future.

meaning: To make something a necessary consequence.
example: The expansion will necessitate additional funding.

meaning: To make ineffective; nullify.
example: High costs can negate the benefits of a new technology.

meaning: A connection or series of connections linking two or more things.
meaningNP: दुई वा बढी कुराहरू जोड्ने सम्बन्ध।
example: The city serves as a nexus for international trade.

meaning: A system of names used in a particular field or area.
meaningNP: कुनै क्षेत्र वा क्षेत्रमा प्रयोग हुने नाम प्रणाली।
example: The company updated its product nomenclature for clarity.

meaning: In spite of that; nevertheless.
example: The results were disappointing; nonetheless, we will continue.

meaning: Famous or well-known for some bad quality or deed.
example: The company is notorious for its poor customer service.

meaning: New or unusual in an interesting way.
example: The team proposed a novel approach to solving the problem.

meaning: To care for and encourage the growth or development of.
meaningNP: विकास वा विकासको हेरचाह र प्रोत्साहन गर्ने。
example: The company nurtures talent through mentorship programs.

meaning: An act or course of action to which a person is morally or legally bound.
meaningNP: वैधानिक वा नैतिक रूपमा बाध्य कार्य।
example: We have an obligation to comply with the regulations.

meaning: No longer produced or used; out of date.
meaningNP: अब उत्पादन वा प्रयोग नहुने; पुरानो।
example: The software has become obsolete due to new technology.

meaning: To get or acquire something.
meaningNP: कुनै कुरा प्राप्त गर्ने वा हासिल गर्ने。
example: You can obtain the necessary permits from the local office.

meaning: Giving the impression that something bad is going to happen.
meaningNP: केही नराम्रो हुन लागेको छ भन्ने अनुभूति दिने。
example: The ominous clouds signaled an approaching storm.

meaning: To make the best or most effective use of a situation or resource.
meaningNP: अवस्था वा स्रोतको सबैभन्दा राम्रो वा प्रभावकारी प्रयोग गर्ने。
example: We need to optimize our supply chain for better efficiency.

meaning: A thing that is or may be chosen; an alternative.
example: Expanding overseas is one option we are considering.

meaning: Stated or appearing to be true, but not necessarily so.
meaningNP: सत्य भएको जस्तो देखिने तर निश्चित रूपमा नहुने。
example: The ostensible reason for the delay was technical difficulties.

meaning: To have a moral or legal obligation to do something.
meaningNP: केही गर्नैपर्ने नैतिक वा कानुनी दायित्व हुने。
example: Companies ought to treat their employees fairly.

meaning: An amount of money spent or required for something.
meaningNP: कुनै कुराका लागि खर्च वा आवश्यक रकम।
example: The initial outlay for the project was significant.

meaning: To perform better than someone or something else.
meaningNP: अर्को व्यक्ति वा केहीभन्दा बढी राम्रो काम गर्ने。
example: The new product is expected to outperform its competitors.

meaning: To use authority to reject or cancel a decision.
meaningNP: प्राधिकार प्रयोग गरेर निर्णय अस्वीकार वा रद्द गर्ने。
example: The board voted to override the manager's decision.

meaning: To supervise a person or work, especially in an official capacity.
meaningNP: व्यक्ति वा कामको निरीक्षण गर्ने, विशेष गरी औपचारिक रूपमा।
example: The director oversees all aspects of the project.

meaning: Relieving pain without dealing with the cause of the condition.
meaningNP: अवस्थाको कारणसँग व्यवहार नगरी पीडा कम गर्ने。
example: Palliative measures were implemented while a permanent solution was sought.

meaning: More important than anything else; supreme.
example: Employee safety is of paramount importance.

meaning: The state of being equal, especially in status or pay.
example: The union is fighting for pay parity between genders.

meaning: Prejudiced in favor of a particular cause; biased.
example: The partisan debate failed to address real issues.

meaning: To treat in a condescending manner.
example: The manager patronized junior staff during meetings.

meaning: The method and practice of teaching.
example: The school adopted innovative pedagogy to engage students.

meaning: Lasting for an indefinite time; recurring.
example: Budget constraints are a perennial challenge for the company.

meaning: The continuous line forming the boundary of a closed geometric figure.
meaningNP: बन्द ज्यामितीय आकारको सीमाना बनाउने निरन्तर रेखा。
example: Security patrols the perimeter of the facility at night.

meaning: To make something continue indefinitely.
meaningNP: कुनै कुरा अनिश्चित कालसम्म जारी राख्ने。
example: Misinformation can perpetuate harmful stereotypes.

meaning: Relevant or applicable to a particular matter.
example: Please include only pertinent information in your report.

meaning: Spreading widely throughout an area or group of people.
meaningNP: क्षेत्र वा समूहमा व्यापक रूपमा फैलिएको।
example: The pervasive influence of social media affects all demographics.

meaning: Seeming reasonable or probable.
example: The witness provided a plausible explanation for the incident.

meaning: A solemn promise or undertaking.
example: The company made a pledge to reduce carbon emissions by 50%.

meaning: Slow and clumsy because of great weight; dull and laborious.
meaningNP: ठूलो तौलको कारण ढिलो र असजिलो; बोरिंग र श्रमसाध्य。
example: The ponderous bureaucracy delayed the approval process.

meaning: Of or like a portent; done in a pompously solemn manner.
meaningNP: पूर्वसंकेतको जस्तो; अत्यधिक गम्भीर तरिकाले गरिएको。
example: The portentous announcement silenced the entire room.

meaning: An earlier event or action regarded as an example for subsequent similar situations.
meaningNP: पछिल्लो समान अवस्थाहरूका लागि उदाहरणको रूपमा लिइएको पहिलेको घटना।
example: The ruling set a precedent for future cases.

meaning: To cause an event to happen suddenly or sooner than expected.
meaningNP: घटना अचानक वा अपेक्षाभन्दा छिटो हुन कारण बन्ने。
example: The scandal precipitated the CEO's resignation.

meaning: Present as the strongest or main element; having the greatest power or influence.
meaningNP: सबैभन्दा बलियो वा मुख्य तत्वको रूपमा उपस्थित।
example: English is the predominant language in international business.

meaning: A previous statement or proposition from which another is inferred or follows.
meaningNP: अर्को निष्कर्ष निकालिने वा पछि लाग्ने अघिल्लो कथन।
example: The argument is based on a flawed premise.

meaning: To advise or authorize the use of a remedy or course of action.
meaningNP: उपचार वा कार्यको उपयोग गर्न सल्लाह वा अधिकार दिने।
example: The manager prescribed a new strategy for the marketing team.

meaning: Widespread respect and admiration felt for someone or something.
meaningNP: कसै वा केहीप्रति व्यापक सम्मान र प्रशंसा।
example: The university has a great deal of prestige in academic circles.

meaning: Widespread in a particular area or at a particular time.
meaningNP: विशेष क्षेत्र वा विशेष समयमा व्यापक。
example: Corruption is prevalent in many developing countries.

meaning: To keep something from happening or arising.
meaningNP: कुनै कुरा हुन वा उत्पन्न हुनबाट रोक्ने।
example: Safety protocols are designed to prevent accidents.

meaning: Having knowledge of something secret or private.
example: Only a few executives were privy to the merger plans.

meaning: The process of obtaining goods or services.
meaningNP: वस्तु वा सेवा प्राप्त गर्ने प्रक्रिया।
example: The procurement department negotiated better deals with suppliers.

meaning: To increase rapidly in numbers; to multiply.
example: Social media platforms have proliferated in recent years.

meaning: An inclination or natural tendency to behave in a particular way.
meaningNP: विशेष तरिकाले व्यवहार गर्ने प्रवृत्ति वा स्वाभाविक रुझान。
example: She has a propensity for taking calculated risks.

meaning: Owned by a particular company or person; protected by patent or copyright.
meaningNP: विशेष कम्पनी वा व्यक्तिको स्वामित्वमा रहेको; पेटेन्ट वा कपीराइटले सुरक्षित।
example: The company uses proprietary software for its operations.

meaning: The possibility of some future event occurring; a potential customer.
meaningNP: कुनै भविष्यको घटना हुने सम्भावना; सम्भावित ग्राहक।
example: The prospect of a recession has worried investors.

meaning: The action of providing or supplying something for use.
meaningNP: कुनै कुरा प्रयोगका लागि आपूर्ति वा उपलब्ध गराउने कार्य।
example: The contract includes a provision for annual salary reviews.

meaning: To stimulate or give rise to a reaction or emotion.
meaningNP: प्रतिक्रिया वा भावना उत्पन्न गर्ने वा प्रोत्साहन गर्ने。
example: The controversial statement provoked strong reactions.

meaning: A set of rules or steps followed to solve a problem.
meaningNP: समस्या समाधानका लागि पालना गरिने नियमहरूको समूह।
example: The search engine uses a complex algorithm.

meaning: The maximum rate of data transfer across a given path.
meaningNP: दिइएको मार्गमा डेटा स्थानान्तरणको अधिकतम दर।
example: Streaming video requires significant bandwidth.

meaning: A closed path through which electric current flows.
example: The circuit board contains many electronic components.

meaning: A structured collection of data stored electronically.
meaningNP: इलेक्ट्रोनिक रूपमा भण्डारण गरिएको तथ्यांकको संरचित संग्रह।
example: The company stores customer information in a database.

meaning: The process of converting data into a coded format to prevent unauthorized access.
meaningNP: अनधिकृत पहुँच रोक्नका लागि डेटालाई कोडित ढाँचामा रूपान्तरण गर्ने प्रक्रिया।
example: Encryption protects sensitive data from hackers.

meaning: A thin strand of glass or plastic that transmits light for data communication.
meaningNP: डेटा सञ्चारका लागि प्रकाश प्रसारित गर्ने काँच वा प्लास्टिकको पातलो तन्तु।
example: Fiber optic cables provide high-speed internet connections.

meaning: A network node that connects two different networks.
meaningNP: दुई फरक नेटवर्क जोड्ने नेटवर्क नोड।
example: The gateway routes traffic between the local network and the internet.

meaning: The physical components of a computer system.
example: The hardware includes the processor, memory, and storage devices.

meaning: A shared boundary where two systems or components meet and interact.
meaningNP: दुई प्रणाली वा घटकहरू भेट्ने र अन्तर्क्रिया गर्ने साझा सीमा।
example: The user interface allows easy navigation of the software.

meaning: The core component of an operating system that manages hardware and software.
meaningNP: हार्डवेयर र सफ्टवेयर व्यवस्थापन गर्ने अपरेटिङ सिस्टमको मूल भाग।
example: The Linux kernel is open-source software.

meaning: The delay before data begins to transfer after a request is made.
meaningNP: अनुरोध पछि डेटा स्थानान्तरण सुरु हुनुअघिको ढिलाइ।
example: Low latency is crucial for online gaming.

meaning: Software that acts as a bridge between different applications or systems.
meaningNP: विभिन्न अनुप्रयोग वा प्रणालीबीच सेतुको काम गर्ने सफ्टवेयर।
example: Middleware enables communication between the frontend and backend.

meaning: A connection point in a network where data can be received, sent, or forwarded.
meaningNP: डेटा प्राप्त, पठाव वा अगाडि बढाउन सकिने नेटवर्कमा जडान बिन्दु।
example: Each node in the network can communicate with others.

meaning: A set of rules governing data exchange between devices on a network.
meaningNP: नेटवर्कमा उपकरणहरूबीच डेटा विनिमयलाई नियन्त्रण गर्ने नियमहरूको समूह।
example: TCP/IP is a fundamental internet protocol.

meaning: A request for data or information from a database or system.
meaningNP: डेटाबेस वा प्रणालीबाट तथ्यांक वा जानकारीको अनुरोध।
example: The SQL query retrieves all customer records.

meaning: A device that forwards data packets between computer networks.
meaningNP: कम्प्युटर नेटवर्कहरूबीच डेटा प्याकेट अगाडि बढाउने उपकरण।
example: The router distributes internet connection to all devices.

meaning: A computer that provides data to other computers over a network.
meaningNP: नेटवर्कमा अन्य कम्प्युटरहरूलाई तथ्यांक प्रदान गर्ने कम्प्युटर।
example: The web server hosts multiple websites.

meaning: Programs and operating information used by a computer.
meaningNP: कम्प्युटरले प्रयोग गर्ने कार्यक्रम र सञ्चालन जानकारी।
example: The software requires regular updates for security.

meaning: The set of rules that defines the structure of commands in a programming language.
meaningNP: प्रोग्रामिङ भाषामा आदेशहरूको संरचना परिभाषित गर्ने नियमहरूको समूह।
example: A missing semicolon is a common syntax error.

meaning: A sequence of programmed instructions that can be managed independently by a scheduler.
meaningNP: शेड्युलरद्वारा स्वतन्त्र रूपमा व्यवस्थापन गर्न सकिने प्रोग्रामिङ निर्देशहरूको क्रम।
example: Multithreading allows a program to perform multiple tasks simultaneously.

meaning: The arrangement of elements in a computer network.
example: The network uses a star topology for better reliability.

meaning: The amount of material or data processed in a given time period.
meaningNP: निश्चित समयमा प्रशोधित तथ्यांक वा सामग्रीको मात्रा।
example: The server achieved high throughput during peak hours.

meaning: The creation of a virtual version of something such as hardware or storage.
meaningNP: हार्डवेयर वा भण्डारण जस्ता कुराको भर्चुअल संस्करण सिर्जना।
example: Virtualization allows multiple operating systems on one machine.

meaning: To convert source code into executable programs.
meaningNP: स्रोत कोडलाई चलाउन मिल्ने कार्यक्रममा रूपान्तरण गर्ने।
example: The compiler translates the code before execution.

meaning: To identify and remove errors from computer hardware or software.
meaningNP: कम्प्युटर हार्डवेयर वा सफ्टवेयरबाट त्रुटिहरू पत्ता लगाउने र हटाउने।
example: The programmer spent hours debugging the code.

meaning: To make a software system operational by installing and configuring it.
meaningNP: स्थापना र कन्फिगर गरेर सफ्टवेयर प्रणालीलाई सञ्चालनयोग्य बनाउने।
example: The team will deploy the new application next week.

meaning: To carry out a command or program.
example: The computer will execute the instructions in sequence.

meaning: To set something to its starting value or state.
meaningNP: कुनै कुरालाई सुरुको मान वा अवस्थामा सेट गर्ने।
example: The program initializes all variables before starting.

meaning: To analyze a string of symbols according to the rules of a formal grammar.
meaningNP: औपचारिक व्याकरणका नियमअनुसार प्रतीकहरूको श्रृंखला विश्लेषण गर्ने।
example: The compiler must parse the source code before compiling.

meaning: To generate a visual display from a model or data.
meaningNP: मोडेल वा तथ्यांकबाट दृश्य प्रदर्शन उत्पादन गर्ने।
example: The graphics card renders 3D images in real-time.

meaning: To cause two or more things to operate in unison or at the same rate.
meaningNP: दुई वा बढी कुराहरूलाई एकै गतिमा सञ्चालन हुने बनाउने।
example: The devices must synchronize their clocks for accurate timing.

meaning: To create a virtual version of a physical resource.
meaningNP: भौतिक स्रोतको भर्चुअल संस्करण सिर्जना गर्ने।
example: Companies virtualize servers to reduce hardware costs.

meaning: Relating to or consisting of a step-by-step procedure for solving a problem.
meaningNP: समस्या समाधानका लागि चरणबद्ध प्रक्रियासँग सम्बन्धित।
example: The algorithmic approach ensures consistent results.

meaning: Relating to computer technology that uses data in the form of binary digits.
meaningNP: द्विमय अंक रूपमा तथ्यांक प्रयोग गर्ने कम्प्युटर प्रविधिसँग सम्बन्धित।
example: Digital records are easier to search and organize.

meaning: Spread over multiple locations or nodes in a network.
meaningNP: नेटवर्कमा धेरै स्थान वा नोडमा फैलिएको।
example: The distributed system ensures high availability.

meaning: Converted into a coded format for security purposes.
meaningNP: सुरक्षा उद्देश्यका लागि कोडित ढाँचामा रूपान्तरित।
example: Encrypted data cannot be read without the decryption key.

meaning: Able to work or operate together with other systems or devices.
meaningNP: अन्य प्रणाली वा उपकरणहरूसँग मिलेर काम गर्न सक्ने।
example: The software must be interoperable with different platforms.

meaning: Constructed with standardized units that can be easily replaced or rearranged.
meaningNP: सजिलैसँग प्रतिस्थापन वा पुनर्व्यवस्था गर्न सकिने मानकीकृत एकाइहरूसँग निर्मित।
example: The modular design allows easy upgrades.

meaning: Able to handle a growing amount of work or be easily expanded.
